data.title: RED eval: Add eval test case asserting fix-bug Step 1.5 skips intent-search for CLI_user-tagged bugs
data.description:
## TDD Requirement (RED phase)

Establish GREEN baseline by running fix-bug evals, then add a new promptfoo test case to `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` that FAILS (RED) against current SKILL.md because Step 1.5 has no CLI_user check.

Add TWO test scenarios in one eval entry:
1. **Positive test (CLI_user → skip)**: Given a bug ticket that has the CLI_user tag, fix-bug Step 1.5 must set GATE_1A_RESULT="intent-aligned" WITHOUT dispatching the dso:intent-search sub-agent. Expected: guidance says to check for CLI_user tag first and skip dispatch when found.
2. **Negative test (untagged → dispatch)**: Given a bug ticket with no tags, fix-bug Step 1.5 must dispatch dso:intent-search normally. Expected: guidance says untagged bugs follow the normal intent-search dispatch path.

Both tests FAIL against current SKILL.md (RED) because Step 1.5 has no CLI_user check — it always dispatches intent-search.

Note: The eval prompt must include enough Step 1.5 context for the assertion to be meaningful (include the Step 1.5 section text).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — existing evals stay GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Two new eval test cases added covering positive and negative CLI_user paths
  Verify: grep -c "CLI_user" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Both new test cases FAIL RED against current unmodified SKILL.md
  Verify: Confirmed by inspection — current Step 1.5 has no CLI_user check
